title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Oberoi Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Oberoi Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oberoi Hotels! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oberoi Hotels:
Oberoi Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
